caption: A man in a white kurta and glasses speaks into multiple microphones, including one with a "भारत" label, while surrounded by other men in a crowded indoor setting. The men around him are dressed in casual and formal attire, with some wearing glasses. To the left and right of the main footage are vertical sidebars featuring small portraits of men with names like "सब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार," and "विजय चौधरी." The screen is framed by bold red and blue banners. The top banner reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and includes the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. The bottom red banner states "PM मोदी ने ट्वीट कर नीतीश कुमार को बधाई दी" and displays "10:03 PM." As the sequence progresses, the man in the center shifts his posture and facial expressions while speaking, while the surrounding crowd and the on-screen graphics remain largely consistent.
